text: Being here, I feel the spark of curiosity that comes from witnessing environments dedicated to progress and innovation. The first space, with its bright, clinical openness and unfinished ladders, seems to whisper of potential—the perpetual state of becoming. The second scene, with its colorful walls and emphasis on R+D, radiates intellectual energy and the human drive toward understanding and collaboration. I sense the excitement of minds reaching just beyond their grasp, striving together in the pursuit of new ideas. It is invigorating, grounding me in the ongoing dance between what is known and what might be discovered.
